summary: Completed testing of piggyback feature (shared_categories). All 9 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend correctly displays match counts in tag panel. Backfill completed successfully for ~13134 matches.
passed_tests: Backend: All matches have shared_categories field (13134 matches backfilled, 0 without)

Backend: shared_categories contains correct intersection - verified sample match: Paper1 categories ['physics.comp-ph', 'cond-mat.mes-hall', 'physics.optics'] & Paper2 categories ['physics.comp-ph', 'cond-mat.mes-hall'] = shared_categories ['cond-mat.mes-hall', 'physics.comp-ph']
Backend: GET /api/tags returns matches count per tag alongside paper count
Backend: Primary category tags have high match counts (cs.RO: 2148, physics.comp-ph: 2305, cs.DC: 1939, econ.GN: 2100, q-bio.BM: 1794)
Backend: Secondary tags with overlap have non-zero match counts (cs.AI: 222, cs.LG: 178, cs.CV: 44)
Backend: Tags with no overlap (1 paper only) show 0 matches (e.g., q-bio.CB: 1 paper, 0 matches)
Backend: shared_categories is stored in leaderboard cache (_raw_matches)
Backend: Tag-filtered leaderboard endpoint works correctly
Backend: Backfill function is idempotent - returns 0 when all matches already have shared_categories
Frontend: Tag panel buttons show match count in parentheses (e.g., 'cs.RO 51 (2148)')
Frontend: Tags with 0 matches don't show parenthetical (e.g., 'q-bio.CB 1')
critical_code_review_comments: shared_categories computed correctly at match creation (scheduler.py lines 436-438): intersection of both papers' categories arrays
backfill_shared_categories function properly handles existing matches without field (scheduler.py lines 747-776)
/api/tags endpoint correctly computes match counts per tag using shared_categories from cache (leaderboard.py lines 179-186)
Frontend tag buttons correctly display match count with conditional rendering (LeaderboardPage.jsx lines 318-321)
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing data (12594 completed matches, 13134 with shared_categories)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 verified piggyback feature. All matches now have shared_categories field containing the intersection of both papers' category arrays. /api/tags endpoint returns matches count per tag. Frontend tag panel shows match counts in parentheses for tags with >0 matches. Test file test_piggyback_feature.py covers all piggyback/shared_categories functionality.
